title: Linear Algebra Foundations
description: Explore scalars, vectors, operations, and transformations across Local, World, and View coordinate spaces.
learningObjectives: Distinguish scalar properties from vector quantities
Define vectors as offsets in Cartesian coordinate grids
Differentiate coordinate reference frames (Local, World, View, Screen)

sections.title: Coordinate Spaces and Reference Frames
sections.content:
Linear algebra is the study of vectors and linear transformations. In game development, spaces translate locations and orientations:

1. **Local Space**: Coordinates relative to the object's origin (e.g. 'the weapon tip is 50 units in front of the model origin').
2. **World Space**: Coordinates relative to the global map center (e.g. 'the player is standing at coordinates (4500, -2300, 100)').
3. **View Space**: Coordinates relative to the camera lens orientation. Used for rendering projections.

sections.title: Converting Local Forward to World Space
